title: Main Teaching Rooms' Basic Teaching Equipment and Facilities Table
source_title: 表 5.1.16 主要教学用房的教学基本设备及设施
metadata: A table listing teaching equipment and facilities for different main teaching rooms; includes blackboard, whiteboard, lectern, projector interface, projection screen, display screen, exhibition area, hanging wire, public address speaker, storage cabinet, teaching cabinet, cleaning cabinet, and communication external network interface.
summary: The table lists various teaching rooms including ordinary classrooms, science classrooms, chemistry and physics laboratories, anatomy laboratories, microscope observation laboratories, comprehensive laboratories, demonstration laboratories, history and geography classrooms, computer classrooms, language classrooms, and art classrooms. Each row corresponds to a specific room type, and columns indicate the presence (●) or absence (—) of various teaching equipment and facilities. For example, ordinary classrooms have blackboards, lecterns, projector interfaces, projection screens, exhibition areas, public address speakers, storage cabinets, and communication external network interfaces, while science classrooms have blackboards, lecterns, projector interfaces, projection screens, exhibition areas, public address speakers, teaching cabinets, and communication external network interfaces. The table provides a clear overview of the equipment and facilities available in each type of teaching room.

title: Classroom Equipment Inventory Table
metadata: A table listing classroom equipment inventory; includes room names and presence/absence of various equipment.
summary: The table provides a detailed inventory of equipment in various rooms, including书法教室 (Calligraphy Classroom), 现代艺术课教室 (Modern Art Classroom), 音乐教室 (Music Classroom), 舞蹈教室 (Dance Classroom), 风雨操场 (Rain or Shine Playground), 合班教室 (Combined Classroom), 阶梯教室 (Auditorium), 阅览室 (Reading Room), 视听阅览室 (Audio-Visual Reading Room), 体质测试室 (Physical Fitness Testing Room), 心理咨询室 (Psychological Counseling Room), 德育展览室 (Moral Education Exhibition Room), and 教师办公室 (Teacher's Office). Each row corresponds to a room, and columns indicate the presence (●) or absence (—) of equipment such as 黑板 (Blackboard), 书写白板 (Writing Whiteboard), 讲台 (Lectern), 投影仪接口 (Projector Interface), 投影屏幕 (Projection Screen), 显示屏 (Display Screen), 展示园地 (Exhibition Area), 挂镜线 (Picture Hanging Line), 广播音箱 (Public Address Speaker), 储物柜 (Storage Cabinet), 教具柜 (Teaching Aid Cabinet), 清洁柜 (Cleaning Cabinet), and 通信外网接口 (Communication External Network Interface). The table allows quick reference to which equipment is available in each room.

title: Main Teaching Rooms' Basic Teaching Equipment and Facilities Table
source_title: 表 5.1.16 主要教学用房的教学基本设备及设施
metadata: A table listing teaching equipment and facilities for different main teaching rooms; includes blackboard, whiteboard, lectern, projector interface, projection screen, display screen, exhibition garden, hanging wire, broadcast speaker, storage cabinet, teaching cabinet, cleaning cabinet, and communication external network interface.
summary: The table lists various teaching rooms including ordinary classrooms, science classrooms, chemistry and physics laboratories, dissection laboratories, microscope observation laboratories, comprehensive laboratories, demonstration laboratories, history and geography classrooms, computer classrooms, language classrooms, and art classrooms. Each row corresponds to a specific room type, and columns indicate the presence (●) or absence (—) of various teaching equipment and facilities. For example, ordinary classrooms have blackboards, lecterns, projector interfaces, and projection screens, while science classrooms have blackboards, lecterns, projector interfaces, projection screens, and broadcast speakers. The table provides a clear overview of the equipment and facilities available in each type of teaching room.

title: Classroom Facility Configuration Table
metadata: A table detailing equipment and facility configurations in various rooms; includes blackboard, whiteboard, lectern, projector interface, projection screen, display screen, exhibition area, hanging wire, speaker, storage cabinet, teaching equipment cabinet, cleaning cabinet, and communication external network interface.
summary: The table lists various rooms such as calligraphy classroom, modern art classroom, music classroom, dance classroom,风雨操场 (rain and wind playground), combined classroom,阶梯教室 (staircase classroom), reading room,视听阅览室 (audio-visual reading room), physical fitness test room, psychological counseling room, moral education exhibition hall, and teacher's office. Each room's configuration is indicated by filled circles (●) or hollow circles (○) under different facility columns, showing whether the room is equipped with that facility. For example, the calligraphy classroom has a blackboard, lectern, projector interface, projection screen, and speaker, while the modern art classroom has a whiteboard, lectern, projector interface, projection screen, and speaker. The table provides a clear overview of the equipment available in each room.

metadata: A table detailing usage area indicators for teaching auxiliary rooms; categorized by elementary and middle school; includes room names, area indicators in square meters per room, and notes.
summary: The table, titled "表 7.1.5 主要教学辅助用房的使用面积指标 (m²/每间)", lists various teaching auxiliary rooms and their corresponding usage area indicators in square meters per room for both elementary and middle schools. The room names include "普通教室教师休息室" (General Classroom Teacher Rest Room), "实验员室" (Laboratory Staff Room), "仪器室" (Instrument Room), "药品室" (Medicine Room), "准备室" (Preparation Room), "标本陈列室" (Specimen Display Room), "历史资料室" (History Materials Room), "地理资料室" (Geography Materials Room), "计算机教室资料室" (Computer Classroom Materials Room), "语言教室资料室" (Language Classroom Materials Room), "美术教室教具室" (Art Classroom Teaching Aids Room), "乐器室" (Instrument Room), and "舞蹈教室更衣室" (Dance Classroom Changing Room). For elementary schools, the indicators are: (3.50) for teacher rest room, 12.00 for lab staff room, 18.00 for instrument room, 18.00 for medicine room, 18.00 for preparation room, 42.00 for specimen display room, 12.00 for history materials room, 12.00 for geography materials room, 24.00 for computer classroom materials room, 24.00 for language classroom materials room, 24.00 for art classroom teaching aids room, 24.00 for instrument room, and 12.00 for dance classroom changing room. For middle schools, the indicators are: (3.50) for teacher rest room, 12.00 for lab staff room, 24.00 for instrument room, 24.00 for medicine room, 24.00 for preparation room, 42.00 for specimen display room, 12.00 for history materials room, 12.00 for geography materials room, 24.00 for computer classroom materials room, 24.00 for language classroom materials room, 24.00 for art classroom teaching aids room, 24.00 for instrument room, and 12.00 for dance classroom changing room. The "备注" (Notes) column provides additional guidance: the teacher rest room indicator is per teacher; specimen display rooms can be placed in enclosed corridors; and some teaching aids for art classrooms can be stored within the art classroom.

The table allows for comparison of area requirements across room types and educational levels.

content:

summary: The table outlines the minimum net height (in meters) for various teaching rooms categorized by educational level: elementary (小学), junior middle school (初中), and senior middle school (高中). For ordinary classrooms, history/geography, art, and music classrooms, the heights are 3.00m, 3.05m, and 3.10m respectively. Dance rooms require 4.50m. Science classrooms, laboratories, computer rooms, labor rooms, technical rooms, and combined classrooms require 3.10m. For阶梯教室 (staircase classrooms), the minimum distance from the last row (highest point of floor) to the ceiling or overhead protrusion is 2.20m.

For the 3rd floor, the width is 0.80m for Grade I-II and 1.05m for Grade III, with no data for Grade IV. The table provides critical design parameters for ensuring safe evacuation in buildings based on structural fire resistance and occupancy level.

title: Teaching Room Lighting Power Density and Corresponding Illuminance Table
source_title: 表9.3.2 教学用房的照明功率密度值及对应照度值
metadata: A table about lighting standards for teaching rooms; includes room types, current lighting power density, target lighting power density, and corresponding illuminance.
content:
| 房间名称 | 照明功率密度( $ W/m^{2} $) | 对应照度值 (lx) |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 现行值 | 目标值 |  |  |
| 普通教室、史地教室、书法教室、音乐教室、语言教室、合班教室、阅览室 | 11 | 9 | 300 |
| 科学教室、实验室、舞蹈教室 | 11 | 9 | 300 |
| 有多媒体设施的教室 | 11 | 9 | 300 |
| 美术教室 | 18 | 15 | 500 |
| 办公室、保健室 | 11 | 9 | 300 |
summary: The table lists different types of teaching rooms and their lighting requirements. The first column, "Room Name," categorizes rooms such as general classrooms, history/geography classrooms, music rooms, language rooms, combined classrooms, reading rooms, science classrooms, laboratories, dance rooms, multimedia-equipped classrooms, art classrooms, offices, and health rooms. The second column, "Lighting Power Density (W/m²)," is subdivided into "Current Value" and "Target Value," showing the current and target power densities for each room type. The third column, "Corresponding Illuminance (lx)," indicates the required illuminance level. For most room types, the current lighting power density is 11 W/m² and the target is 9 W/m², with a corresponding illuminance of 300 lx. Art classrooms have a higher current value of 18 W/m² and target value of 15 W/m², with a corresponding illuminance of 500 lx. Offices and health rooms follow the same standard as general classrooms.

summary: The table outlines the sound insulation standards for various main teaching rooms. It includes three columns: "Room Name," "Air Sound Insulation Standard (dB)," and "Top Floor Board Impact Sound Insulation Single Value Evaluation (dB)." The "Room Name" column lists categories such as "Language Classroom, Reading Room," "Ordinary Classrooms, Laboratories, etc., between rooms without noise generation," "Ordinary Classrooms, Laboratories, etc., between rooms with noise generation," and "Music Classroom, etc., between rooms generating noise." The "Air Sound Insulation Standard (dB)" column specifies minimum requirements (e.g., ≥50, ≥45). The "Top Floor Board Impact Sound Insulation Single Value Evaluation (dB)" column specifies maximum allowable values (e.g., ≤65, ≤75). The table provides clear thresholds for sound insulation performance in different educational environments.
